message:
fix(grpc): make CallContext deadline expiry boundary-inclusive and testable

Changed is_expired() from `now > deadline` (strictly-after) to `now >= deadline`
(at-or-after), matching the standard gRPC semantics where a deadline means
"must complete before this instant" — at exactly the deadline instant the call
is already expired.

Extracted is_expired_at(now) to make the boundary condition deterministically
testable without relying on wall-clock timing. The public is_expired() delegates
to is_expired_at(Instant::now()).

Added test_call_context_expiry_boundary_is_inclusive verifying:
- At exactly the deadline instant: expired
- 1ms before the deadline: not expired

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
